objective: Each active regime must reach 95% confidence and remain suitably confident across other markets, other timeframes, full cycle, and full species before reporting completion.
concrete_success_criteria: Bull, Bear, Sideways, and Crisis each have accepted 95% evidence with explicit rule/signal, support, and chronological/cross-context validation.
Separate direct Manipulation has accepted direct rows and controls for all required varieties or explicit abstain coverage that satisfies the full-species objective.
Validation covers other markets, other timeframes, and full-cycle periods, including unresolved 2026 recency if required.
No proxy labels, OHLCV-only manipulation proxies, HMM/generated/future-return labels, or unsupported index crosswalks are used as source labels.
A downstream consumer contract exists and does not overclaim trade usability or full objective completion.

primary_blockers: full direct Manipulation species coverage remains incomplete
spoofing/layering has positive cases but no matched negative controls
strict ticker/root 1h support remains partial at 41/156
full-cycle and 2026 recency coverage remain incomplete

next_action: Keep using regime_factor_consumer_map_v1.csv as the scoped downstream consumer contract; do not call update_goal. To close the full objective, acquire source-owned direct Manipulation row exports with matched negatives for missing species and extend source-backed full-cycle/2026 coverage instead of running more proxy sweeps.
